INV_DESC_SKILL_HARPOON_LEFT: Advanced Weaver talent. Throw the Silk-strung needle to the left and charge towards it.
INV_DESC_SKILL_HARPOON_RIGHT: Advanced Weaver talent. Throw the Silk-strung needle to the right and charge towards it.
INV_DESC_WALLJUMP_LEFT: Ancient Weaver technique. Cling to left surfaces and leap off to rapidly scale heights.
INV_DESC_WALLJUMP_RIGHT: Ancient Weaver technique. Cling to right surfaces and leap off to rapidly scale heights.
INV_DESC_SKILL_SPRINT_LEFT: Fabled Weaver talent. Dash left and sprint with unnatural speed, as though gliding upon Silk.
INV_DESC_SKILL_SPRINT_RIGHT: Fabled Weaver talent. Dash right and sprint with unnatural speed, as though gliding upon Silk.
